assertions.title: Schema Evolution — Missing Fields Default to Null

steps.action: Load exp_0000 via data_loader and check 8 later-era fields
steps.expected: All 8 fields (strict_score, forgetting_depth, forgetting_score, eval_v2_score, retention_curve, selectivity_score, robustness_score, threshold_summary) are None
steps.observed: All 8 fields are None for exp_0000

steps.action: Load exp_lme_0059 via data_loader and check same 8 fields
steps.expected: All 8 fields are non-None with actual values
steps.observed: All 8 fields have non-None values: strict_score=0.458456, forgetting_depth=0.3675, forgetting_score=1.0, eval_v2_score=0.3455, retention_curve=dict, selectivity_score=0.0, robustness_score=0.0, threshold_summary=dict

assertions.title: Schema Evolution — Threshold Metrics Key Variation

steps.action: Access missing thresholds '0.1' and '0.8' on exp_0000
Check exp_0000 params for beta_fact presence and floor_max absence
Check exp_lme_0059 params for floor_max and no beta_fact
Check exp_lme_0000 params for assoc_boost and no beta_fact
steps.observed: assoc_boost=0.0 present, beta_fact not in keys

steps.action: Verify exp_0000 snapshots have ticks [0,20,...,200] (11 items)
Verify old-era snapshots have fewer keys (no retention_curve, threshold_summary, eval_v2_score, selectivity_score, robustness_score)
steps.observed: exp_0000 has 22 snapshot keys, missing all 5 newer keys

steps.action: Verify exp_lme_0059 snapshots have more keys (retention_curve, selectivity_score present)
steps.expected: New-era snapshots have retention_curve and selectivity_score
steps.observed: exp_lme_0059 has 28 snapshot keys including retention_curve and selectivity_score

steps.action: Verify experiments with no snapshots field default to empty list
steps.expected: 11 experiments without snapshots field → empty list after loading
steps.observed: 11 experiments (exp_0004, exp_0163, exp_0259, exp_lme_0032, exp_lme_0054, exp_lme_0056, exp_lme_0058, exp_lme_0063, exp_lme_0066, exp_lme_0067, exp_lme_0070) all have empty snapshots list

summary: Tested 4 schema evolution assertions: all 4 passed. The data_loader correctly handles field defaults across eras — old experiments get null for newer fields, threshold key counts vary (4 vs 9) with missing keys returning None, params.json fields differ by era (beta_fact vs floor_max/assoc_boost), and snapshot arrays have consistent structure with 11 ticks and cross-era key differences handled gracefully.
